description: CompositionNavy blue t-shirt made of 100% polyester, is engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has a mock neck, short raglan sleeves and printed nike swoosh on the left chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dry lowWarm ironCrafted from soft cotton-polyester fabric and engineered with Dri-Fit technology, this t-shirt from nike offers exemplary dry comfort, making it a great everyday choice for your healthy runs and casual days. Team this tee with jeans and running shoes for a sporty look. Add on a hooded sweatshirt for exemplary comfort during winters.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
